name: Mozzarella Parmigiana
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Pkg. mozzarella cheese, cut into 8 slices, lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat each cheese slice in flour.
2. Dip the coated slices in beaten egg.
3. Dip the egg-coated slices in bread crumbs.
4. Repeat steps 1-3 to coat with additional bread crumbs.
5. Fry the coated cheese slices in hot oil until browned, about 1-2 minutes on each side.
6. Spray a baking dish with Pam cooking spray.
7. Place a small amount of spaghetti sauce at the bottom of the baking dish.
8. Arrange a layer of fried mozzarella cheese slices in the dish.
9. Sprinkle grated locatelli cheese and shredded mozzarella evenly over the layers.
10. Pour the remaining spaghetti sauce over the top.
11. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
12. Serve immediately.
